ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "state_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "state_area" REAL /* Area of the state in square miles */,
  "state_population_density" REAL /* Population density of the state (population per square mile) */,
  "state_gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product of the state */,
  "state_median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "state_median_household_income" REAL /* Median household income */,
  "state_unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_demographics" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the state */,
  "hispanic_population" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic population */,
  "white_population" REAL /* Percentage of White population */,
  "black_population" REAL /* Percentage of Black population */,
  "native_population" REAL /* Percentage of Native population */,
  "asian_population" REAL /* Percentage of Asian population */,
  "pacific_population" REAL /* Percentage of Pacific population */,
  "average_income" REAL /* Average income in the state */,
  "gender_population" TEXT /* String representation of gender population (e.g., '2341093M_2489527F') */,
  "male_population" INTEGER /* Number of male population */,
  "female_population" INTEGER /* Number of female population */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "male_median_age" REAL /* Median age of the male population */,
  "female_median_age" REAL /* Median age of the female population */,
  "male_median_income" REAL /* Median income of the male population */,
  "female_median_income" REAL /* Median income of the female population */,
  "male_unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the male population */,
  "female_unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the female population */,
  "population_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual population growth rate */,
  "median_household_size" REAL /* Median household size */,
  "median_home_value" REAL /* Median home value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "year")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string (e.g., browser and device information) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data accessed in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
